user.title: Set up MyCupra (Read-Only)
user.description:
Before continuing, complete these steps in the EU Data Act Portal:

1. Open eu-data-act.drivesomethinggreater.com and sign in with your Cupra/SEAT credentials.
2. Click on your vehicle (Vehicle details).
3. Scroll down to 'Your data files' and grant data access if not done yet.
4. Create a new recurring request: click the plus icon or 'New request', select 'Recurring', give it a name (e.g. 'Home Assistant') and confirm.
5. The portal will now generate a new data file every 15 minutes.

Only then enter your e-mail and password here. VIN and request identifier are detected automatically.

vin.title: Select vehicle
vin.description: The following vehicles were found in your portal account.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Vehicle and request identifier were detected automatically. Enter a device name and the desired update interval.

error.cannot_connect: Connection failed (network issue or server temporarily unavailable).
error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Please check your e-mail and password.
error.no_vehicles: No vehicles found in the portal. Please register a vehicle on eu-data-act.drivesomethinggreater.com first.
error.no_data_request: No recurring data request found for this vehicle. Please create one on eu-data-act.drivesomethinggreater.com first.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Please check the logs.

init.title: MyCupra Settings
